{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eſnuu ta Sohbina Af- 
mini lizzis prett wiſſahm winnu 
Wahrtim/ tã ka tahin Sirđim 
buhs tskust/ un tahin Peedaufi- 
ſchanahm wairoteeß; Ak! tas irr 
padarrihfs par Spihdeſchanu/ 
un irr afs darrihts us Kaufchanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zehrt tu Sohbins weenâ 
Spehka/ greesees pa labbo Roh- 
ku/ taitaje/ greesees pa kreifo 
Rohku/ kur taws Waigs gree- 
schahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir es pats faſittifchu 
mannas Rehkas/ un liſſchu 
mannu Bahrsibu beigtees; Es 
tas KUNGS eſmu to runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Atkah notikfe ta KUN- 
GA Wahrdes us man/un fazzija;
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu tad ak Zilweſka 
Behrns! leeż preecſch tewun diwi 
Zettus/ zaur fo tam Sohbtiam 
ta Rehuina no Babelcs irr ja- 
nahk/ no weenas Seimnes buhs 
teem abbeem iſtezzeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un iſreds weenu Puſfi/ 
iſreds to us ta Pilſtahta Zetta 
Preeſchu. Padarr weenu Zet- 
tu/ zaur fo tam Sohbtiam irr 
janahk prett Rabbas Ammona 
Behruu/ jeb prett Juhda us to 
ſtipru Pilſtahtu Jeruſalemi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas Rehninsch no Ba- 
beles ſtahwehs pee ta Zetta Juh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta Sihlefchana turrefees 
pa winna labbo Rohku prett Je- 
rusalemi/ ka tur Ahſchus buhs 
peeiveſt/ ka Zaurimus buhs is- 
rakt par Kaufchanu/ ka to Balſi 
buhs pazelt ar Gawileſchanas/ 
ka Ahſchus buhs likt prett Wahr- 
tun/ ka Walli buhs uſmeſt/ un 
Butwerkus uſtaisfht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schis buhs ka aplaina 
Sihlefchana winnu Azzis/ ta- 
pehz ka tee ar Swehreſchanu 
winnceem irr ſwebrejſchi/ bet 
wiſch peemininehs to Noseegu- 
mu/ka teem buhs guhſtieem tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht ta faſka tas 
Klings KUNGS: Tapehz ka 
juhs effat liſſufchi juhjus Nosee- 
gumus peeminneht/ juhfu Pahr- 
cahpſchanas apklahdami/ ta ka 
juhsu Grehti tohy redseti wiſſos 
juhfös Darbös/ pehz to ka juhs 
tohpat peeminneti/ tad tapjeet 
juhs ar Rohkahm guhſtiti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tu/ ak tu nolahdehts 
beſdeeuiſs Leels-Kungs eelſch 
Iſraeta! ka Deena nahk/ kad tas 
Noseeguma Laiks pa Gallam 
buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta faſka tas Klings 
KUNGS: Leez nobſt to Zeppu- 
ri/ un jem ſcunne to Krebni/ jo 
tas tew poſtahwiai ne paließ/ es 
pa-augſituaſchn to/ kas ſeinſirr/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
